Media Object
Media Object base API
Data Fields
buffer_t Struct Reference

Buffer containing memory blocks, timestamp and metadata. More...

#include <buffer.h>

Data Fields

memories_t * memories
 
uint64_t timestamp
 
uint32_t nb
 
properties_t * metadata
 

Detailed Description

Each element of the memories array represents one plane of the buffer. For interleaved (packed) formats the array contains a single entry; for planar formats it contains one entry per plane.

Field Documentation

◆ memories

memories_t* buffer_t::memories

Array of memory blocks (one per plane).

Optional metadata properties.

◆ nb
